metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Profile, engineering principles, and technology stack for Productivity Engineer Rym.

profile.bio1: I am focused on maximizing engineering team productivity through CI/CD pipeline optimization, developer tooling, and infrastructure automation so engineers can stay close to the code.
profile.bio2: Measure, automate, and improve is the operating principle behind my day-to-day work on better development workflows.
